name: Norwegian Finans Holding ASA
summary: Norwegian Finans Holding ASA, through its subsidiary, Bank Norwegian AS, provides various digital banking products and services to retail customers in Norway, Finland, Sweden, and Denmark. The company offers banking services in the form of consumer loans, credit cards, and deposits through Internet. It also provides a combined credit card and reward card in cooperation with the airline Norwegian. Norwegian Finans Holding ASA was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Fornebu, Norway.
